title: The Infinite Loop ♾️
description: Run code forever (or until you tell it to stop).

slides.title: Do It Again! 🔄
slides.content:
Rust provides three main kinds of loops: `loop`, `while`, and `for`.

Let's start with the most basic but powerful: the raw `loop`.

slides.title: To Infinity... ♾️
Breaking Out 🛑

quizData.question: Which keyword breaks out of a `loop` completely and immediately?
quizData.explanation: The `break` keyword instantly exits the loop.

slides.title: Returning Values from Loops 🎁

quizData.question: How do you return the value `100` from an infinite `loop` cleanly into a variable?
quizData.explanation: Adding a value after `break` acts identically to a `return` for the loop expression.
